nasb.text: They shall eat the flesh that same night, roasted with fire, and they shall eat it with unleavened bread and bitter herbs.

esv.text: They shall eat the flesh that night, roasted on the fire; with unleavened bread and bitter herbs they shall eat it.

cnv.text: 當那一夜，你們要吃羊羔的肉，肉要用火烤了，和無酵餅與苦菜一同吃，

ccb.text: 当晚，你们要用火把羊肉烤熟，与无酵饼和苦菜一起吃。
